schema.description: The output of concept execution (Rt). explanation is populated when explain: true is passed to the request. SDK mapping: result (not conceptResult), result.value, result.deterministic, result.explanation (camelCase).

value.description: Computed concept output. Type matches the concept's declared output type.

deterministic.description: True when timestamp was provided in the request.

explanation.description: Populated when explain: true is passed to the request. Contains node-level computation details, contribution attribution, and execution trace. Null when explain is false or omitted.

contributions.description: Attribution of each input signal to the final output. Keys are signal names, values are contribution amounts.

nodes.description: Node-level computation details in execution order.

trace.description: Step-by-step execution trace in topological order.

schema.title: ConceptResult
